translations.### WWDC 2024 — Discover Swift enhanceme: ### WWDC 2024 — Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework
translations.### iOS Vision framework x WWDC 24 Disco: ### iOS Vision framework x WWDC 24 Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework Session
translations.#### What’s new in Vision? (iOS 18) — 身體: #### What’s new in Vision? (iOS 18) — Simultaneous Body and Hand Gesture Pose Detection
translations.#### What’s new in Vision? (iOS 18)— 圖片評: #### What’s new in Vision? (iOS 18)— Image scoring feature (quality, memorable points)
translations.#### 優化 (2) — TaskGroup Concurrency + 限制: #### Optimization (2) — TaskGroup Concurrency + Limiting Concurrency Count
translations.#### 部分商品無 Barcode，如散裝水果只有商品標籤\n\n: #### Some products have no barcode, such as loose fruits with only product labels

translations.***6 年前曾經小玩過： [Vision 初探 — APP 頭像上傳 自動識別: ***Played with this 6 years ago: [Vision Introduction — APP Avatar Upload Automatic Face Detection and Cropping (Swift)](../9a9aa892f9a9/)***
translations.***問題：圖片辨識、截圖操作非常消耗記憶體性能，如果無節制狂加並行任務，可能造: ***Issue: Image recognition and screenshot operations are very memory-intensive. Adding unlimited concurrent tasks may cause user lag and OOM crashes.***
translations.**Request:** DetectFaceRectanglesRequest:
**Request:** DetectFaceRectanglesRequest - Face Rectangle Detection Request  
**Result:** FaceObservation  
The previous article "[Vision Introduction — APP Profile Picture Upload Automatic Face Cropping (Swift)](../9a9aa892f9a9/)" used this request pair.
translations.*因手邊沒有實體 iOS 18 裝置進行測試，所以本文中的所有執行結果都是使用舊: *Since I don't have a physical iOS 18 device for testing, all results in this article are based on the old (pre-iOS 18) code; **please leave a comment if there are any errors with the new syntax**.*
translations.*本文是針對 WWDC 24 — [Discover Swift enhance: *This article is a summary of the WWDC 24 — [Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2024/10163/?time=45){:target="_blank"} session, along with some personal experiment notes.*
translations.*這次搭配 [WWDC 24 Discover Swift enhancemen: *This time, paired with the [WWDC 24 Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework Session](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2024/10163/){:target="_blank"}, I revisited and explored it again with the new Swift features.*
translations.- APIs Newly Designed for Swift Language:
- APIs Newly Designed for Swift Language Features

- New features and methods are Swift-only, available on iOS ≥ 18

- New Image Aesthetic Scoring Feature, Body + Hand Gesture Tracking
translations.- Adding VN at the beginning is the old: - Adding VN at the beginning is the old API style (versions before iOS 18).
translations.- Built-in Numerous Image Recognition an:
- Built-in Numerous Image Recognition and Motion Tracking Methods (31 Types as of iOS 18)

- On-device computation uses only the phone's chip, performing recognition without relying on cloud services, making it fast and secure.

- API is simple and easy to use

- Apple platforms support iOS 11.0+, iPadOS 11.0+, Mac Catalyst 13.0+, macOS 10.13+, tvOS 11.0+, visionOS 1.0+

- Released for many years (2017–present) and continuously updated

- Integrating Swift language features to enhance computational performance
translations.- Can achieve dynamic tracking of people:
- Can achieve dynamic tracking of people and objects

- Gesture capture enables air signature functionality
translations.- Can calculate a score for the input im:
- Can calculate a score for the input image, making it easy to filter high-quality photos

- The scoring method includes multiple dimensions, not only image quality but also lighting, angle, subject, **and whether it evokes memorable feelings**, among others.
translations.- Detecting Human Figures in Images: Det:
- Detecting Human Figures in Images: DetectHumanRectanglesRequest

- Detecting poses of humans and animals (both 3D and 2D): DetectAnimalBodyPoseRequest, DetectHumanBodyPose3DRequest, DetectHumanBodyPoseRequest, DetectHumanHandPoseRequest

- Detect and track the motion path of objects (across different frames in videos or animations): DetectTrajectoriesRequest, TrackObjectRequest, TrackRectangleRequest
translations.- High-quality images: composition, ligh:
- High-quality images: composition, lighting, and memorable elements

- Low-quality images: No clear subject, like casual or accidental shots

- Source image: Technically well-shot but lacks memorability, like images used for stock photo libraries.
translations.1. **Request:** DetectFaceRectanglesRequ:
1. **Request:** DetectFaceRectanglesRequest - Face Rectangle Detection Request  
   **Result:** FaceObservation  
   The previous article "[Vision Introduction — APP Profile Picture Upload Automatic Face Cropping (Swift)](../9a9aa892f9a9/)" used this request pair.

2. **Request:** RecognizeTextRequest - Text Recognition Request  
   **Result:** RecognizedTextObservation

3. **Request:** GenerateObjectnessBasedSaliencyImageRequest - Objectness-Based Saliency Request  
   **Result:** SaliencyImageObservation
translations.1. Vision will remove CPU and GPU suppor:
1. Vision will remove CPU and GPU support for some requests on devices with a Neural Engine. On these devices, the Neural Engine offers the best performance.  
   You can check this using the `supportedComputeDevices()` API.

2. Remove all VN prefixes  
   `VNXXRequest`, `VNXXXObservation` -> `Request`, `Observation`

3. Use async/await to replace the original VNRequestCompletionHandler

4. Use `*Request.perform()` directly instead of the original `VNImageRequestHandler.perform([VN*Request])`
translations.> ***Issue: Image recognition and screen: > ***Issue: Image recognition and screenshot operations consume a lot of memory. Adding unlimited concurrent tasks may cause user lag and out-of-memory crashes.***

translations.> *This article is a summary of the WWDC: > *This article is a summary of WWDC 24 — [Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2024/10163/?time=45){:target="_blank"} session, along with some personal experiment notes.*
translations.> *This time, paired with the [WWDC 24 D: > *This time, paired with the [WWDC 24 Discover Swift enhancements in the Vision framework Session](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2024/10163/){:target="_blank"}, I revisited and explored it again with the new Swift features.*
translations.> [***Vision***](https://developer.apple: > [***Vision***](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/){:target="*blank"} _is mainly used for image analysis tasks such as face recognition, barcode detection, and text recognition. It provides powerful APIs to process and analyze visual content in static images or videos._
translations.> [***VisionKit***](https://developer.ap: > [***VisionKit***](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/visionkit){:target="*blank"} _: Specifically designed for handling document scanning tasks. It provides a scanner view controller to scan documents and generate high-quality PDFs or images._
translations.API 簡單好操作\n: API is Simple and Easy to Use
translations.Apple 全平台均支援 iOS 11.0+, iPadOS 11.0+, Ma: Apple platforms support iOS 11.0+, iPadOS 11.0+, Mac Catalyst 13.0+, macOS 10.13+, tvOS 11.0+, visionOS 1.0+
translations.Apple 在這次的更新當中提供了新的 Swift Vision API 封裝給: Apple has provided a new Swift Vision API wrapper for developers in this update. Besides supporting the original features, it mainly enhances Swift 6 / Swift Concurrency capabilities, offering more efficient and Swift-friendly API usage.
translations.Apple 還有另外一個 Framework 叫 [CoreML](https:: Apple also has another framework called [CoreML](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coreml){:target="_blank"}, which is an on-device chip-based machine learning framework. It allows you to train your own object or document recognition models and embed them directly into your app. Interested users can give it a try. (e.g. [real-time article classification](../793bf2cdda0f/), real-time [spam detection](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E7%86%8A%E7%8C%AB%E5%90%83%E7%9F%AD%E4%BF%A1-%E5%9E%83%E5%9C%BE%E7%9F%AD%E4%BF%A1%E8%BF%87%E6%BB%A4/id1319191852){:target="_blank"} …)
translations.On-Device 單純使用手機晶片運算，辨識過程不依賴雲端服務，快速又安全\n: On-Device computation uses only the phone's chip, performing recognition without relying on cloud services, making it fast and secure.
translations.The Vision Framework API has been redesi: The Vision Framework API has been redesigned to leverage modern Swift features like concurrency, making it easier and faster to integrate a wide array of Vision algorithms into your app. We’ll tour the updated API and share sample code, along with best practices, to help you get the benefits of this framework with less coding effort. We’ll also demonstrate two new features: image aesthetics and holistic body pose.
translations.Vision framework 功能回顧 & iOS 18 新 Swift A: Vision framework Feature Review & iOS 18 New Swift API Hands-on Experience
translations.Vision framework 在 M1 機型上無法跑在模擬器，只能接實體手機: The Vision framework cannot run on the simulator for M1 models and can only be tested on physical devices. Running it in the simulator environment throws a `Could not create Espresso context` error. Checking the [official forum discussion, no solution was found](https://forums.developer.apple.com/forums/thread/675806){:target="_blank"}.
translations.Vision framework 是 Apple 整合機器學習的圖像辨識框架，讓: The Vision framework is Apple’s machine learning-based image recognition framework, enabling developers to easily and quickly implement common image recognition features. The Vision framework was first introduced in iOS 11.0+ (2017 / iPhone 8) and has been continuously updated and optimized. It has improved integration with Swift Concurrency to enhance performance, and starting from iOS 18.0, it offers a brand-new Swift Vision framework API to fully leverage Swift Concurrency.
translations.Vision 將在具備神經引擎的設備上移除對部分請求的 CPU 和 GPU 支持:
Vision will remove CPU and GPU support for some requests on devices with a Neural Engine. On these devices, the Neural Engine offers the best performance.  
You can check this using the `supportedComputeDevices()` API.
translations.WWDC 中給了以上三張圖片做說明(相同畫質之下)，分別是：\n\n: WWDC provided the above three images for explanation (with the same image quality), which are:

translations.[***Vision***](https://developer.apple.c: [***Vision***](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/){:target="*blank"} _is mainly used for image analysis tasks such as face recognition, barcode detection, and text recognition. It provides powerful APIs to process and analyze visual content in static images or videos._
translations.[***VisionKit***](https://developer.appl: [***VisionKit***](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/visionkit){:target="*blank"} _: Specifically designed for handling document scanning tasks. It provides a scanner view controller to scan documents and generate high-quality PDFs or images._

translations.```rust\nVN*Request -> *Request (e.g. VN:
```rust
VN*Request -> *Request (e.g. VNDetectBarcodesRequest -> DetectBarcodesRequest)
VN*Observation -> *Observation (e.g. VNRecognizedObjectObservation -> RecognizedObjectObservation)
VNRequestCompletionHandler -> async/await
VNImageRequestHandler.perform([VN*Request]) -> *Request.perform()
```
translations.| Request 用途:
| Request Purpose | Observation Description | |-----------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------| | CalculateImageAestheticsScoresRequest
Calculate the aesthetic score of an image. | AestheticsObservation
Returns the aesthetic score of the image, including composition, color, and other factors. | | ClassifyImageRequest
Classify image content. | ClassificationObservation
Returns classification labels and confidence for objects or scenes in the image. | | CoreMLRequest
Analyze image using a Core ML model. | CoreMLFeatureValueObservation
Generates observations based on the Core ML model output. | | DetectAnimalBodyPoseRequest
Detect animal poses in the image. | RecognizedPointsObservation
Returns animal skeleton points and their positions. | | DetectBarcodesRequest
Detect barcodes in the image. | BarcodeObservation
Returns barcode data and type (e.g., QR code). | | DetectContoursRequest
Detect contours in the image. | ContoursObservation
Returns detected contour lines in the image. | | DetectDocumentSegmentationRequest
Detect and segment documents in the image. | RectangleObservation
Returns the rectangular boundary of the document. | | DetectFaceCaptureQualityRequest
Evaluate face capture quality. | FaceObservation
Returns quality assessment scores of the face image. | | DetectFaceLandmarksRequest
Detect facial landmarks. | FaceObservation
Returns detailed positions of facial features (e.g., eyes, nose). | | DetectFaceRectanglesRequest
Detect faces in the image. | FaceObservation
Returns bounding boxes of detected faces. | | DetectHorizonRequest
Detect the horizon in the image. | HorizonObservation
Returns the angle and position of the horizon. | | DetectHumanBodyPose3DRequest
Detect 3D human body poses in the image. | RecognizedPointsObservation
Returns 3D human skeleton points and spatial coordinates. | | DetectHumanBodyPoseRequest
Detect human body poses in the image. | RecognizedPointsObservation
Returns human skeleton points and their coordinates. | | DetectHumanHandPoseRequest
Detect hand poses in the image. | RecognizedPointsObservation
Returns hand skeleton points and their positions. | | DetectHumanRectanglesRequest
Detect humans in the image. | HumanObservation
Returns bounding boxes of detected humans. | | DetectRectanglesRequest
Detect rectangles in the image. | RectangleObservation
Returns coordinates of the four vertices of rectangles. | | DetectTextRectanglesRequest
Detect text regions in the image. | TextObservation
Returns positions and bounding boxes of text regions. | | DetectTrajectoriesRequest
Detect and analyze object motion trajectories. | TrajectoryObservation
Returns motion trajectory points and their time sequence. | | GenerateAttentionBasedSaliencyImageRequest
Generate attention-based saliency image. | SaliencyImageObservation
Returns saliency maps highlighting the most attractive areas of the image. | | GenerateForegroundInstanceMaskRequest
Generate foreground instance mask image. | InstanceMaskObservation
Returns masks of foreground objects. | | GenerateImageFeaturePrintRequest
Generate image feature prints for comparison. | FeaturePrintObservation
Returns feature print data of the image for similarity comparison. | | GenerateObjectnessBasedSaliencyImageRequest
Generate objectness-based saliency image. | SaliencyImageObservation
Returns saliency maps highlighting object regions. | | GeneratePersonInstanceMaskRequest
Generate person instance mask image. | InstanceMaskObservation
Returns masks of person instances. | | GeneratePersonSegmentationRequest
Generate person segmentation image. | SegmentationObservation
Returns binary masks for person segmentation. | | RecognizeAnimalsRequest
Detect and identify animals in the image. | RecognizedObjectObservation
Returns animal types and confidence levels. | | RecognizeTextRequest
Detect and recognize text in the image. | RecognizedTextObservation
Returns detected text content and its region positions. | | TrackHomographicImageRegistrationRequest
Track homographic image registration. | ImageAlignmentObservation
Returns homography transformation matrix between images for alignment. | | TrackObjectRequest
Track objects in the image. | DetectedObjectObservation
Returns object positions and velocity information in the image. | | TrackOpticalFlowRequest
Track optical flow in the image. | OpticalFlowObservation
Returns optical flow vector field describing pixel movements. | | TrackRectangleRequest
Track rectangles in the image. | RectangleObservation
Returns position, size, and rotation angle of rectangles in the image. | | TrackTranslationalImageRegistrationRequest
Track translational image registration. | ImageAlignmentObservation
Returns translation transformation matrix between images for alignment. |
translations.一次只執行一個，效率、效能緩慢。\n\n: Running one at a time results in slow efficiency and performance.
translations.以往只能個別偵測人體 Pose 和 手部 Pose，這次更新可以讓開發者同時偵測: Previously, only body pose and hand pose could be detected separately. This update allows developers to detect body pose and hand pose simultaneously, combining them into a single request and result, making it easier to develop more applications.
translations.低分的圖片：沒有主體、像是隨手或不小心拍的\n: Low-quality images: No clear subject, like casual or accidental shots
translations.使用 async/await 取代原本的 VNRequestCompletion: Using async/await to replace the original VNRequestCompletionHandler
translations.假設我們有一個圖片牆列表，每張圖片都需要自動裁切出物件主體；這時候可以善用 Sw: Suppose we have a photo wall list, and each image needs automatic cropping to focus on the main subject; in this case, Swift Concurrency can be used to improve loading efficiency.
translations.偵測人、動物的 Pose 動作 (3D or 2D 都可以)：DetectAni: Detecting poses of humans and animals (both 3D and 2D): DetectAnimalBodyPoseRequest, DetectHumanBodyPose3DRequest, DetectHumanBodyPoseRequest, DetectHumanHandPoseRequest
translations.偵測圖像中的人體：DetectHumanRectanglesRequest\n: Detecting Human Figures in Images: DetectHumanRectanglesRequest
translations.偵測圖片中的條碼、QRCode 數據。\n\n: Detect barcode and QR code data in images.
translations.內建眾多圖片辨識、動態追蹤方法 (iOS 18 為止一共 31 種)\n: Built-in Numerous Image Recognition and Motion Tracking Methods (31 Types as of iOS 18)
translations.分數計算方式包含多個維度，不只是畫質，還有光線、角度、拍攝主體、 **是否有讓人: The scoring method includes multiple dimensions, not just image quality, but also lighting, angle, subject, **and whether it evokes memorable feelings**, among others.
translations.前面的 `perform(barcodesRequest, textReques: The previous `perform(barcodesRequest, textRequest)` method waits for both requests to complete before continuing; starting with iOS 18, the new `performAll()` method streams responses, allowing you to handle each request result as soon as it arrives—for example, responding immediately when a barcode is detected.
translations.前面補上 VN 就是舊的 API 寫法 (iOS 18 以前的版本)\n: Adding VN at the beginning is the old API style (versions before iOS 18).
translations.可以實現人、物件動態捕捉\n: Can achieve dynamic tracking of people and objects
translations.可對輸入圖片得計算出分數，方便篩選出優質照片\n: Can calculate a score for the input image, making it easy to filter high-quality photos
translations.因此我們的掃瞄器也需要同時支援掃描純文字標籤。\n\n: Therefore, our scanner also needs to support scanning plain text labels simultaneously.
translations.將每個 Task 都加入 TaskGroup Concurrency 執行。\n: Add each Task into a TaskGroup for concurrency execution.
translations.已發布多年 (2017~今) 且不斷更新\n: Released for many years (2017~present) and continuously updated
translations.我們可以從 `observation.boundingBox` 取得 Barco: We can get the barcode location from `observation.boundingBox`, but unlike the common UIView coordinate system, the `boundingBox` origin is at the bottom-left corner, with values ranging between 0 and 1.
translations.截至 iOS 18 為止，支援 18 種語言。\n\n: As of iOS 18, 18 languages are supported.
translations.手勢補捉實現隔空簽名功能\n: Gesture Capture Enables Air Signature Functionality
translations.整合 Swift 語言特性提升運算效能\n: Integrating Swift Language Features to Enhance Computational Performance
translations.新的功能、方法都為 Swift Only, iOS ≥ 18 可用\n: New features and methods are Swift Only, available on iOS ≥ 18
translations.新的圖片評分功能、身體＋手部動作追蹤\n: New Image Scoring Feature, Body + Hand Gesture Tracking
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.檢測並追蹤物件的運動軌跡(在影片、動畫不同的偵中)：DetectTrajecto: Detect and track the motion path of objects (across different frames in videos or animations): DetectTrajectoriesRequest, TrackObjectRequest, TrackRectangleRequest
translations.泰國當地人推薦鵝牌清涼膏\n\n: Thai Locals Recommend Goose Brand Cooling Balm
translations.為 Swift 語言特性新設計的 API\n: APIs Newly Designed for Swift Language Features
translations.直接使用 `*Request.perform()` 取代原本的 `VNImage: Directly use `*Request.perform()` instead of the original `VNImageRequestHandler.perform([VN*Request])`
translations.素材的圖片：技術上拍的很好但是沒有記憶點，像是作為素材圖庫用的圖片\n: Source image: Technically well-shot but lacks memorability, like images used for stock photo libraries.
translations.講者提到了幾個常用的 Request，如下。\n\n: The speaker mentioned several commonly used Requests, as follows.
translations.跟 Vision Pro 的關係就跟熱狗跟狗的關係一樣，毫無關係。\n\n: The relationship with Vision Pro is like that between a hot dog and a dog—completely unrelated.
translations.辨識圖片中的動物與置信度。\n\n: Recognize animals in the image along with confidence levels.
translations.辨識圖片中的文字內容。(a.k.a 圖片轉文字)\n\n: Recognize the text content in images. (a.k.a. Image to Text)
translations.辨識輸入的圖片，得到標籤分類與置信度。\n\n: Identify the input image to obtain label classification and confidence.
translations.這邊講者又重新介紹了一次 Vision framework 的基礎使用方式，Ap: Here the speaker reintroduced the basic usage of the Vision framework. Apple has already packaged [31 types](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/visionrequest){:target="_blank"} (as of iOS 18) of common image recognition requests called "Request" along with their corresponding returned "Observation" objects.
translations.高分的圖片：取景、光線、有記憶點\n: High-quality images: composition, lighting, and memorable elements
translations.👉👉👉本次讀書會分享源於 KKday App Team 組內每週技術分享活動，: 👉👉👉This study group sharing comes from the weekly technical sharing sessions within the KKday App Team. **The team is currently enthusiastically recruiting a [Senior iOS Engineer](https://kkday.bamboohr.com/careers/25?source=aWQ9Mjk%3D){:target="_blank"}. Interested candidates are welcome to apply.** 👈👈👈
